qcSource: Author Test Cases -  Instruction for Student.pdf
architectureNotes: Instructions for Students is a FIXED page in the Table of Contents (grouptoc.studentInstructions), NOT a dropped component/widget. Tests reach it via cy.navigateToCanvasPage() which clicks the 'Instructions for Students' TOC entry and verifies the [new-toc] page attributes.

SOURCE AMBIGUITY: the QC catalog dataType is 'instructionsstudents', but that exact string is NOT present in config.js / index.html / ngcontroller.js. The real, source-verified identifier is the AngularJS pageType 'studentInstructions'. The catalog dataType is retained as a logical slug only; all selectors are derived from the verified 'studentInstructions' markup.

Canvas is #desktop_view (ng-drop / onDropComplete). Authored elements render as #desktop_view .sd-item. The flat-page placeholder reads 'Enter instructions for students here.' (index.html, gated on pageType==='studentInstructions').

config.studentInstructions permits ONLY element drops header, paragraph (Text), poetry, image, tablesNew (Table) — all assessment widgets/layouts are false. The deep spec adds a Text element (paragraph) to exercise the add-element / editable-content capability, then asserts the source-allowed element set (Image/Table/Header/Title family) for TC_09–TC_12.

Rich-text formatting (font, bold/italic/underline, bullets, colour) lives in the floating textEditor.html toolbar mounted on focus; the spec degrades gracefully when the overlay is not mounted in headless context. Applied-style rendering, Publish, Reader, republish, persistence-after-reload, and empty-publish validation are deferred.
Not yet live-verified against a running authoring instance; selectors are source-derived.
